parents.subject: LU-17444 utils: fix fd leak after conversion to llapi_root_path_open

commit.subject: LU-17418 libcfs: fix libcfs init.
commit.message:
LU-17418 libcfs: fix libcfs init.

Libcfs should make debug subsystem init while loading,
otherwise it caused a panic with debug settings if none other
modules loaded.

This reverts commit f3494a6e9ffeb82bf1b34e557b4cfda1eaf8ef9d.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Alexey Lyashkov <alexey.lyashkov@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Ic5562f93bd2705439d58251bcf23a7f49d63daea
